name: operator override: plugin-namespace rule with same id as _operator/ rule gains superseded_by_operator: true
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"superseded_by_operator":true' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: printf '${baseSrc.replace('src-1','google-src')}rules:\n  - {id: r1, name: r1, description: x, detector: x}\n' > tree/google/g.yaml
printf '${baseSrc.replace('src-1','op-src')}rules:\n  - {id: r1, name: r1, description: stricter, detector: x}\n' > tree/_operator/o.yaml
